overall.description: A flying car navigates through a dense, rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis with towering skyscrapers, neon advertisements, and heavy fog. The vehicle weaves between buildings, over waterways, and under overpasses before approaching a stadium and landing on a rooftop pad. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront district with petrochemical facility

events.description: flying car accelerates and ascends from near the PETROCHEM building
moving from industrial complex toward open waterway corridor

agents.ego_description: flying car ascending and accelerating away from the industrial complex, navigating toward the waterway

entered.detail: large industrial building with PETROCHEM signage on the facade
tall cylindrical industrial structure with metallic finish
multi-level highway overpass crossing the waterway
wide water channel running through the city with concrete embankments
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a flying car launching from near the PETROCHEM industrial building in a foggy, rain-soaked district. The vehicle ascends over a wide waterway canal, passing under the shadow of massive elevated highway structures and concrete support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterway passing under elevated highway bridges

events.description: vehicle banks left to follow the curve of the waterway canyon
exiting the covered bridge area into more open downtown district

agents.ego_description: navigating the flying car through narrow corridors between buildings and under highway overpasses, following the waterway

entered.detail: mid-rise commercial structures lining the waterway
complex multi-level highway junction with ramps
illuminated commercial signage visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The flying car continues through the waterway canyon, passing under massive elevated highway bridges and between concrete support pillars. The environment transitions from industrial to commercial as neon signs become visible through the fog, and the vehicle banks to follow the waterway's curve.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic advertisements and skyscrapers

events.description: sharp right bank to navigate between closely spaced skyscrapers
entering area with dense neon signage and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: weaving through dense urban canyon, banking sharply around corners between high-rise towers covered in neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: another flying car visible in the distance navigating the same corridor

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying commercial content
distinctive cylindrical building with glowing red and white signage
tightly packed high-rise towers with glass facades and neon lighting
large circular stadium structure with white roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the dense downtown core, weaving between tightly packed skyscrapers covered in holographic billboards and neon signs. The flying car banks sharply to navigate the urban canyon, passing a distinctive circular building while the large stadium structure becomes visible in the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium district with rooftop landing pad

events.description: beginning descent while banking around the stadium structure
final approach and landing on the rooftop pad

agents.ego_description: circling the stadium structure while descending, then aligning with and landing on a rooftop landing pad

entered.detail: circular landing platform with markings on a high-rise rooftop
large industrial ventilation units and smoke stacks emitting steam
greenery and structures on adjacent building rooftops

segments.scene_description: The flying car approaches the large stadium arena, banking around it while beginning its descent. The vehicle leaves the dense commercial district behind, flying over highway interchanges before aligning with a rooftop landing pad. Steam rises from ventilation structures as the car touches down on the pad, with the stadium now visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a flying car journeys from a bleak industrial district into the neon-lit heart of a cyberpunk metropolis before descending toward a stadium. It begins by launching from near the Petrochem building, ascending over a wide waterway canal beneath the heavy shadows of elevated highway structures and concrete pillars. As the vehicle banks to follow the curve of the waterway, the environment shifts from industrial gray to a commercial glow as neon signs begin to pierce through the rain and fog. The scene then tightens into a dense downtown core, weaving between skyscrapers adorned with holographic billboards and passing a circular building before the massive stadium structure emerges in the distance. Finally, the car banks around the arena and descends over highway interchanges, gliding through rising steam to touch down on a rooftop landing pad with the stadium looming in the background.
